parameters.content:
## Litigation limitation and deadline calculator

Rules-based limitation and procedural deadline calculator for Canadian litigation matters, covering nine jurisdictions. Scheduling aid only, not legal advice.

### How it works

1. An intake form collects the matter, jurisdiction, claim type, trigger event, and trigger date.
2. An editable rules table holds the multi-province limitation periods, procedural rules, and holidays.
3. A Luxon engine matches the rule, applies the period, and rolls dates off weekends and holidays.
4. Each deadline is written to Google Calendar with staggered reminder events and logged to Google Sheets.
5. A summary of every deadline is posted to Slack and emailed to the responsible lawyer.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Connect Google Calendar, Google Sheets, Gmail, and Slack credentials.
- [ ] Open Set the Rules Table and set the calendar ID, sheet ID, Slack channel, and team email.
- [ ] Review the limitation and procedural rules for the jurisdictions you practise in.
- [ ] Adjust the holiday list and reminder offsets if needed.

### Customization

Edit the rules, holidays, reminder offsets (default 90, 30, 7 days), business-day rolling, and timezone in the one rules node. Add a jurisdiction or claim type by extending the table; the engine picks it up with no code changes.

## Collect matter intake
Form captures the matter, jurisdiction, claim type, and the trigger event and date.

## Set the rules table
Start here. The only place to edit the law: multi-province limitation rules, procedural rules, holidays, reminder offsets, and the calendar, sheet, Slack, and email placeholders.

## Calculate the deadlines
Luxon engine matches the rule, applies the period, rolls off weekends and holidays, and cites the rule on every record.

## Write deadlines to calendar
All-day event for each deadline, plus one event per staggered reminder.

## Log to the matter register
Appends one row per deadline to a Google Sheet register.

## Notify the team
Posts one Slack message and emails one Gmail summary of all deadlines.
